last_task.subject: For the UI on port 3000 all the fleet VMs still show Arc / arc0.btc in the header. Let's queue tasks to fix all agents Arc included: in the header use the Bitcoin Face next to name and BNS name. Arc is "arc0" and the rest match their BNS name. Also queue a task to save the Bitcoin Face for each agent as an asset next to Arc's assets so we can reuse. If you append &onchain=true you'll get the recursive inscription SVG per the spec, Drop identity dupe block. Restart web services when done on each.
